chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-129 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of M.A. 587/2026 For hearing of main case 24.02.2026 Mr. Shoukat Ali Pathan, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh along with Barkat Ali Burdi, Mukhtiarkar, Bulri Shah Kareem (Respondent No.5). ----------- Pursuant to the earlier order, Barkat Ali Burdi, Respondent No.5 (Mukhtiarkar, Bulri Shah Kareem) has effected appearance. Learned Addl. A.G. Sindh has filed written statement of the Mukhtiarkar along with certain documents under the cover of his statement. Respondent No.5 submits that if proper application for mutation (Foti Khata Badal) in the record of rights in the name of legal heirs of deceased Liaquat Ali Khan son of Fazal Dad Khan in respect of survey numbers mentioned under entries No.73 and 74 of Deh Form-VII, situated in Deh Saeedpur, Taluka Bulri Shah Kareem, District Tando Muhammad Khan, is filed annexing therewith the required documents i.e. Family Registration Certification (FRC), Death Certificate of the deceased as well as Computerized National Identity Cards (CNICs) of the legal heirs of deceased, the same shall be decided in accordance with law after observing all the codal formalities. Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner will file such application within seven days. If such application is filed, the same shall be decided in accordance with law after observing all codal formalities. The Petition stands disposed of along with listed Application in the above terms.

If such application is filed, the same shall be decided in accordance with law after observing all codal formalities. The Petition stands disposed of along with listed Application in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
